# Vantare Crystal Glassmorphism · referencia canónica

Esta worksheet congela la fuente visual del reemplazo Crystal. La autoridad es exclusivamente `docs/overlay-glassmorphism-pro.html`, secciones numeradas 01–16. El bloque final `V2. WIDGETS REESTILIZADOS (GLASSMORPHISM PRO)` queda excluido porque no representa la composición original de referencia.

| ID | Tipo funcional | Design ID | Sección HTML | Selector | Tamaño esperado |
| --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | ---: |
| relative | relative | relative-crystal-vertical | 01 | `.widgets-row > .glass-card:nth-child(1)` | 357 × 288 |
| standings | standings | standings-crystal-vertical | 01 | `.widgets-row > .glass-card:nth-child(2)` | 360 × 650 |
| broadcast | broadcast-tower | broadcast-tower-crystal | 02 | `.broadcast-ticker` | 1872 × 71 |
| fuel | fuel-strategy | fuel-strategy-crystal-unified | 03 | `.unified-fuel-card` | 680 × 204 |
| pedals-telemetry | pedals-telemetry | pedals-telemetry-crystal | 04 | `.telemetry-showcase > .telemetry-col:nth-child(1)` | 323 × 152 |
| pedals-telemetry-compact | pedals-telemetry-compact | pedals-telemetry-compact-crystal | 04 | `.telemetry-showcase > .telemetry-col:nth-child(2)` | 280 × 172 |
| pedals | pedals | pedals-crystal | 04 | `.telemetry-showcase > .telemetry-col:nth-child(3)` | 240 × 261 |
| flags | racing-flags | racing-flags-crystal | 05 | `.flag-card:nth-child(1)` | 280 × 92 |
| delta-bar | delta | delta-crystal-bar | 06 | `.delta-bar-wrapper:nth-child(1)` | 440 × 92 |
| delta-trace | delta-trace | delta-trace-crystal | 07 | `.dt-container` | 1000 × 144 |
| schedule | race-schedule | race-schedule-crystal | 08 | `.rs-container` | 780 × 583 |
| head-to-head | head-to-head | head-to-head-crystal | 09 | `.h2h-container` | 780 × 150 |
| input-blade | input-telemetry | input-crystal-blade | 10A | `.in10a-container` | 780 × 96 |
| input-capsule | input-telemetry | input-crystal-capsule | 10B | `.in10b-container` | 780 × 100 |
| input-dense | input-telemetry | input-crystal-dense | 10C | `.in10c-container` | 780 × 68 |
| multiclass | multiclass-relative | multiclass-relative-crystal | 11 | `.mc-container` | 780 × 210 |
| weather | track-weather | track-weather-crystal | 12 | `.tw-container` | 240 × 420 |
| damage-visual | car-damage-visual | car-damage-visual-crystal | 13 | `.w13-car-visual` | 150 × 190 |
| damage-numbers | car-damage-numbers | car-damage-numbers-crystal | 14 | `.w14-damage-nums` | 140 × 148 |
| delta-simple | delta | delta-crystal-simple | 15 | `.w15-delta-simple` | 420 × 69 |
| delta-advanced | delta-advanced | delta-advanced-crystal | 16 | `.w16-delta-adv` | 480 × 42 |

La captura estable añadirá a cada entrada el hash SHA-256 y el bounding box medido en Chromium con viewport 1920×1080, DPR 1, fuentes listas y animaciones desactivadas.
